empty.none: No races yet — pick a goal to chase.

upcoming.addToPlanTitle: Add this race to your plan

past.passed: This race has passed — add your time to keep the record.

find.locationDenied: Location unavailable or denied — showing all races by name.
find.catalogueUnavailable: The race catalogue couldn't be loaded right now. Your own races are still listed under My Races.
find.noneInRadius: No races within {{radius}} km. Try a wider radius or turn off Near me.
find.noMatch: No races match — try a different search.
find.unlocatedBelow: No races within {{radius}} km. Races without a set location are listed below.
find.addSubtitle: Add it — instantly visible to everyone.
find.userSubmittedNote: Races are user-submitted and tagged unverified until a maintainer reviews them.

card.unverifiedTitle: Unverified — details are user-submitted, check the official site
card.datesDisclaimer: Dates are user-submitted — always verify on the official site before planning.

result.alsoLog: Also add to my run log

form.title: Add a race
form.name: Race name
form.alreadyListed: Already listed? Add your date to an existing race:
form.disclaimer: Races can be added by anyone and are user-submitted until a maintainer verifies them. Always confirm the date on the official site before planning around it.
form.addedToast: Added — thanks! It's live for everyone (unverified until reviewed).

errors.dateDistance: A date and distance are required.
errors.name: A race name is required.
errors.save: Couldn't save that race. Please try again.

picker.title: Set race location
picker.noMatch: No match found — you can still tap the map directly.
picker.hint: Tap or drag the pin onto where the race actually starts — not necessarily where you are right now.
picker.noKey: Map tiles need VITE_MAPTILER_KEY — you can still tap to set coordinates.
